productDisplayName: Reebok Men Winning Stride White Red
description: 1. Synthetic leather, mesh upper layer ensures comfortable Fit2. Lace-up front, padded inners with logo on the side3. Soft inner lining with removable insole, keeps your feet in the right position4. Flexible midsole with SmoothFit seamless lining5. Rubber traction outsole that increases muscle toning activity6. Comes with DMX foam technology to enhance performanceYou asked for it, you got it: the muscle toning shoe for men. These reebok winning stride walking shoes help you stretch your limits on your daily walks. Compared to a traditional shoe, the EasyTone Stride encourages more activation in the glutes, hamstrings and calves. Ideal for walking and everyday activities. EasyTone patented micro instability sole technology builds up to 28% more strength in the glutes and up to 11% more in the hamstrings and calves. SmoothFit seamless liner minimizes friction and gives you irritation free walks. Removable PU sockliner for superior cushioning, accommodates orthotics. Keep on walking with these reebok Winning Stride shoes.
